scriptItem.scriptCode: n = kwargs.get("node", None) if n.type().name() == "redshift_vopnet": import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif "rs_usd_material_builder" in n.type().name(): import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif n.type().name() == "octane_vopnet": import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif "octane_solaris_material_builder" in n.type().name(): import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif n.type().name() == "materialbuilder": import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif n.type().name() == "principledshader::2.0": import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif n.type().name() == "subnet": import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif n.type().name() == "collect": import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif "mtlxopen_pbr_surface" in n.type().name(): import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() elif "mtlxstandard_surface" in n.type().name(): import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_material() else: hou.ui.displayMessage('Please select Material Builder Nodes to save Material')
import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_gradient(kwargs.get("node", None))
import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_cop(kwargs.get("node", None))
import matlib from matlib.utils import rc_calls import importlib importlib.reload(rc_calls) rc_calls.save_code(kwargs.get("node", None))
